38 _21D IMPRMNT_GRP_DSCHRG_CD (21d) Impairment Group: Discharge CHAR 9 The Impairment Group Code (IGC) that best describes the primary impairment at discharge from the rehabilitation program. Each IGC consists of a two-digit number (indicating the major Impairment Group) followed by
